segments.text: WOMAN: Good evening. King's Restaurant.
segments.translation: 女士：晚上好。国王餐厅。

segments.text: MAN: Good evening. I'm ringing about the job.
segments.translation: 男士：晚上好。我打电话想了解下工作。

segments.text: I understand you have vacant.
segments.translation: 我知道您这儿有职位空缺。

segments.text: WOMAN: Oh yes.
segments.translation: 女士：噢，是的。

segments.text: MAN: I'd like to find out a few more details, if I may.
segments.translation: 男士：我想知道更多细节，如果可以的话。

segments.text: WOMAN: Yes, of course. Can I take your name?
segments.translation: 女士：是的，当然。可以知道你的名字吗？

segments.text: MAN: It's Peter Chin.
segments.translation: 男士：我叫彼特·陈。

segments.text: WOMAN: Okay Peter.
segments.translation: 女士：好的，彼特。

segments.text: Well, if you want to ask about the job and then if we're both still interested, we could arrange for you to come for an interview.
segments.translation: 嗯，如果你想了解这份工作，并且之后我们双方仍感兴趣的话，我们可以为您安排一次面试。

segments.text: MAN: Great, thanks. I'm afraid I missed the advert for the job but heard about it from a friend.
segments.translation: 男士：太好了，谢谢。抱歉我没看到工作的广告，但从一位朋友那听说了这份工作。

segments.text: WOMAN: That's no problem at all.
segments.translation: 女士：这没问题。

segments.text: What would you like to know?
segments.translation: 你想了解些什么？

segments.text: MAN: Well, um, what sort of work is it - washing up?
segments.translation: 男士：啊，是什么工作呢？洗碗吗？

segments.text: WOMAN: It's answering the phone.
segments.translation: 女士：是接电话。

segments.text: MAN: Oh right, fine.
segments.translation: 男士：噢，这样，好的。

segments.text: WOMAN: And not waiting at table.
segments.translation: 女士：不是招待用餐。

segments.text: MAN: That'd be good. And how many nights a week would it be?
segments.translation: 男士：那太好了。每周工作几晚啊？

segments.text: WOMAN: Well, we're really only busy at the weekend.
segments.translation: 女士：啊，我们真心只有周末才忙。

segments.text: MAN: So two nights?
segments.translation: 男士：那么两晚？

segments.text: WOMAN: Three actually, so it would work out at twelve hours a week.
segments.translation: 女士：实际上是三晚，所以总共是每周12小时。

segments.text: MAN: That'd be fine. It wouldn't interfere with my studies.
segments.translation: 男士：那挺好的。这和我的学习就不冲突啦。

segments.text: WOMAN: Are you at the university?
segments.translation: 女士：你在上大学吗？

segments.text: MAN: Yes. First year Physics student.
segments.translation: 男士：对的。我是物理系大一的学生。

segments.text: WOMAN: Oh, right.
segments.translation: 女士：哦，好的。

segments.text: MAN: Um, and because I'm not an EU national would I need a work permit?
segments.translation: 男士：啊，因为我不是欧盟公民，我是否需要工作许可证呢？

segments.text: WOMAN: Yes you would. Just get your tutor to sign it.
segments.translation: 女士：是的，你需要的。让你的导师签字即可。

segments.text: MAN: That wouldn't be a problem, if I were to get the job.
segments.translation: 男士：如果我得到这份工作，那应该没问题的。

segments.text: Um, where exactly is the restaurant?
segments.translation: 餐厅具体在哪里呢？

segments.text: WOMAN: Well, we have two branches - the one we're recruiting for is in Hillsdunne Road.
segments.translation: 女士：哦，我们有两家分店，正招员工的这家在希尔斯敦路。

segments.text: MAN: I don't know that.
segments.translation: 男士：我不知道哪里。

segments.text: How do you spell it please?
segments.translation: 怎么拼写这个名呢？

segments.text: WOMAN: It's H-I-double L-S-D-U-double N-E Road.
segments.translation: 女士：是H-I-两个L-S-D-U-两个N-E路。

segments.text: MAN: Got that. Thanks. Is it near a bus stop?
segments.translation: 男士：收到。谢谢。附近有公交车站吗？

segments.text: WOMAN: Yes. The nearest one would probably be just beside the Library.
segments.translation: 女士：是的。最近的应该就在图书馆附近。

segments.text: MAN: Oh yes, I know it. That'd be fine for me.
segments.translation: 男士：噢，好，我知道那儿。应该没什么问题。

segments.text: And could I ask about the pay?
segments.translation: 还有我能问问薪酬吗？

segments.text: WOMAN: We're offering £4.45 an hour.
segments.translation: 女士：我们每小时给4.45镑。

segments.text: MAN: That's very good. My last job was £3.95 an hour.
segments.translation: 男士：那太好了。我上一份工作每小时才3.95镑。

segments.text: WOMAN: We feel it's pretty good and we also offer some good fringe benefits.
segments.translation: 女士：我们觉得还不错哦，我们还提供一些很棒的附带福利。

segments.text: MAN: Really?
segments.translation: 男士：是吗？

segments.text: WOMAN: Well, we give you a free dinner, so you eat well.
segments.translation: 女士：对，我们给你免费餐食，所以你吃得不错。

segments.text: MAN: Right, better than hostel food!
segments.translation: 男士：好呢，比青年旅馆的食物强。

segments.text: WOMAN: We certainly hope so!
segments.translation: 女士：我们当然希望如此。

segments.text: And we also offer extra pay for working on national holidays.
segments.translation: 并且我们对于在国家法定假日工作提供额外薪酬。

segments.text: MAN: Oh, that's a really good perk, isn't it?
segments.translation: 男士：噢，这可真不错，不是吗？

segments.text: WOMAN: Yes, we think so.
segments.translation: 女士：是的，我们觉得是。

segments.text: And then because of the difficulties of getting public transport, if you're working after 11 o'clock we drive you home.
segments.translation: 还有因为公共交通不方便，如果你工作到11点以后，我们会开车送你回家。

segments.text: MAN: Oh, that's good to know.
segments.translation: 男士：噢，那真是个好消息。

segments.text: WOMAN: Well, we'd certainly be interested in inviting you for an interview, if you're still interested?
segments.translation: 女士：那么，我们真心有意请你来面试一下，你还感兴趣吗？

segments.text: MAN: Oh yes, certainly. Could I just also ask what qualities you're looking for?
segments.translation: 男士：嗯，是的，当然啦。我想再问一下你们想要具有什么样素质的人呢？

segments.text: WOMAN: Well, for this particular job we want a clear voice, which you obviously do have!
segments.translation: 女士：这个职位我们需要声音清晰，很明显你的确是的。

segments.text: MAN: Thanks.
segments.translation: 男士：谢谢。

segments.text: WOMAN: And you must be able to think quickly, you know.
segments.translation: 女士：还有你必须要能快速思考，你知道。

segments.text: MAN: Well, I hope I'd ...
segments.translation: 男士：啊，我希望我……

segments.text: WOMAN: So, when could you come in for an interview?
segments.translation: 女士：那么，你什么时候回来面试？

segments.text: We're actually quite quiet tonight?
segments.translation: 其实我们今晚应该不会太忙的。

segments.text: MAN: Sorry, I couldn't come tonight.
segments.translation: 男士：抱歉，我恐怕今晚不行。

segments.text: Or tomorrow, I'm afraid.
segments.translation: 明晚也不行。

segments.text: Thursday's okay - that'd be 22nd of October.
segments.translation: 周四可以的，也就是10月22日。

segments.text: WOMAN: Fine, after 5 p.m.?
segments.translation: 女士：好的，下午5点之后？

segments.text: MAN: Yes, fine. Would 6 o'clock be okay?
segments.translation: 男士：好的，可以。六点可以吗？

segments.text: WOMAN: Perfect. And could you bring along the names of two referees?
segments.translation: 没问题。你能告诉我两个推荐人的名字吗？

segments.text: MAN: Yes, that's fine, no problem.
segments.translation: 没问题。

segments.text: WOMAN: Good. I look forward to seeing you.
segments.translation: 女士：好的。很期待见到你。

segments.text: MAN: Oh, by the way, who should I ask for?
segments.translation: 男士：对了，顺便问一下，我应该找谁呢？

segments.text: WOMAN: Oh yes, of course, sorry.
segments.translation: 女士：哦是，当然，不好意思。

segments.text: My name is Samira Manuja.
segments.translation: 我的名字叫Samira Manuja。

segments.text: MAN: Can you spell that, please?
segments.translation: 男士：可以麻烦您拼写一下吗？

segments.text: WOMAN: M-A-N-U-J-A.
segments.translation: 女士：M-A-N-U-J-A。

segments.text: MAN: Okay, I've got that. Thanks very much.
segments.translation: 男士：好的，收到。非常感激！

segments.text: WOMAN: Look forward to seeing you ...
segments.translation: 女士：期待与你相见……
